title: France's national political crisis is taking root locally
subhead: The first round of the municipal elections, marked by low turnout and fragmented landscapes in big cities, confirms the depth of France's political crisis, writes Le Monde columnist Françoise Fressoz.

title: France ready to join Strait of Hormuz ship escorts once situation 'calmer,' Macron says
subhead: The French president emphasized nevertheless that 'we are not a party to the conflict and therefore France will never take part in operations to open or liberate the Strait of Hormuz.'

title: Senior US counterterrorism official resigns to protest Iran war
subhead: In his resignation letter to Donald Trump, Joseph Kent said 'Iran posed no imminent threat to our nation, and it is clear that we started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby.'

title: UAE's fishermen are collateral victims of the war in Iran
subhead: Since the start of the war in Iran, fishing boats have been confined to ports along the Emirati coastline near the Strait of Hormuz. In Dubai, the sector has come to a standstill and fish market prices have soared.

title: Violence in restaurant kitchens exposes deep wounds in fine dining
subhead: The recent allegations against renowned Danish chef René Redzepi highlight the urgent need for a profound overhaul of management practices in the restaurant industry. Initiatives are spreading in France to break the silence surrounding abuse in the sector.

title: How Epstein made himself indispensable to MoMA's former chair Leon Black
subhead: Disclosed files reveal close ties between the late financier and the billionaire art market funder. Emails, testimonies and financial documents raise new questions about the businessman's involvement in Jeffrey Epstein's sex trafficking networks.

title: French local elections: First-round results give sense of political landscape one year before presidential vote
subhead: With blurred lines between the right and far right, rivalry between the radical left and the Socialists and the fading of the presidential party, the period between the two rounds of the municipal vote is a testing ground for political power balances ahead of the 2027 election.
